title: Gaurick
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Gaurick |region=[[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |sector=[[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] |system=[[Gaurick system/Legends|Gaurick system]] |coordinates=S-4 |xyz= |distance= |suns=1 |orbited= |position= |moons= |routes=[[Tingel Route]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere=[[Atmosphere/Legends|Type 1]] {{C|Breathable}} |climate=[[Temperature/Legends|Temperate]] |gravity= |terrain=*21% [[Forest/Legends|Forest]] *16% [[Jungle/Legends|Jungle]] *16% [[Grass/Legends|Grassland]] *47% Other |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|You're not still sore about my strafing your pressure dome on that asteroid—''"
"''Not at all. I deserved it for trying to get the better of you on those chak-root runs to Gaurick.|Han Solo and [[Big Bunji/Legends|Big Bunji]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''}} '''Gaurick''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. It was controlled by a religious cult, with leaders known as ''[[mufti]]s'', with the cult being known as the ''Renouncers''. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and his partner [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] were hired to deliver [[Chak-root/Legends|chak-root]] to workers on Gaurick; the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] were almost taken captive when some of the workers had religious objections to the substance. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Shadow of Revan]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Gaurick}} *''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Gaurick }} [[Category:Agriworlds]] [[Category:Corporate Sector Authority planets]] [[Category:Corporate Sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Tingel Route]] [[Category:Planets in the Outer Rim Territories]]
